title: FALLMON Data Pack
description:
This is in an beta state so there is a lot of unfinished content.

FALLMON but it's a data pack. (Different species, radiation, etc.)
body:
FALLMON Data Pack is a simple project made by 2 people that changes many of the game's mechanics. This adds different species (currently only has stat changes), a radiation system (which increases either from zombies or just standing in water), two modes, etc.

-----------------------------------------------
_NOTE: This is from the **Legacy** version, not the redone version, as the rework is unfinished._

This datapack is capatible with version 1.20.2. May not work for older/newer versions. _(v2 is going to work on 1.21)_

# Features
- 38 available Pokémon
  - They don't have moves yet, only modifiers.
- Radiation (WIP)
  - Will give you negative effects the more radiation you have.
- Some game changes
  - No mob griefing, slower time, etc.
# Getting Started
## Download
1. Have Minecraft 1.20.2 Frabic installed (because for some reason it doesn't work properly in normal vanilla)
2. Download the data pack (If you are having problems downloading from here go to the [github releases](https://github.com/ClassicBoost/FALLMON-in-Minecraft/releases))
3. Unzip the datapack
4. See **Creating Worlds** (below)
5. Enjoy (see [wiki](https://github.com/ClassicBoost/FALLMON-in-Minecraft/wiki) for more info)

## Creating Worlds
When creating a world, Cheats must be enabled. To activate the datapack: click datapacks and put the FALLMON folder inside the folder.

_Best Recommended with world type: Wooded Badlands / Badlands / Desert_

When loading into a world use the command: **/function fallmon:starter** (Which is prompted when loading in).

If you are using an existing world; go to edit, open world folder then go to datapacks, and put the datapack in there.

For all of the commands refer to [here](https://github.com/ClassicBoost/FALLMON-in-Minecraft/wiki/Commands)
